properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V3 C2 V4 C2

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Time just draws away And as I look back on the year Memories of happiness and bitter tears Through it all there was a common thread that cannot be ignore You were there teaching me to be your servant Lord

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: All along, your hand has been guiding me Shaping my life to be a beautiful song All along, you've led me through The things that you do would make me strong For thou has been there all along

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Every joy and pain had a reason of its own Now i've realized that I was not alone The changing season of my life would not left us the chance But I know you are working to fulfill your plans

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Tomorrow that we turn around And I look back unto day I will understand your purpose And my faithful heart will sing
